title: Hook sidecar closeout, state-prep, and compaction-marker capture
user_task: As Eva, receive bounded Codex hook payloads, capture closeout and compaction lifecycle markers into LCO-owned derived cache, and prepare public-safe state packets without reading raw transcripts or mutating Codex.
expected_public_safe_evidence: compaction marker mode and pre_compact or post_compact lifecycle
prepared state packet from LCO prepared-state reports only
proof_boundary: Dry-run CLI scenario for the LCO 1.2 hook sidecar. It proves closeout capture, state-prep job recording, and marker-only compaction lifecycle packets as LCO-owned derived cache. It does not prove true Codex compaction-summary capture, model compaction, Codex source-store mutation, live control, GUI mutation, external writes, unattended autonomy, npm publish, GitHub Release creation, or 1.2 GA readiness.
next_action: Use OpenClaw gateway dogfood in #413 to prove an agent can consume prepared-state tools without raw transcript reads.
